# Security Policy ## Supported Versions | Version | Supported | | ------- | ------------------ | | 1.0.x | :white_check_mark: | | 2.0.x | :white_check_mark: | | 3.0.x | :white_check_mark: | ## Reporting a Vulnerability To report a security vulnerability, please use the [Tidelift security contact](https://tidelift.com/security). Tidelift will coordinate the fix and disclosure.
